text: Being here, I am struck by a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The glass doors and the fire safety equipment give the space a modern, almost clinical feel, yet behind the transparent walls, the bold R+D exhibit promises exploration and creativity. The text on the screen evokes a gentle, contemplative mood—suggesting moments of openness and connection. I feel welcomed into a space where learning and reflection naturally coexist, inviting me to pause, observe, and ponder the evolving relationship between humans and technology.
